## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content strategy, blog production, and SEO optimization for Monograph.](https://fathom.video/share/zB4xBTrdA2zw4bekAEbzrqFaLa1r1JAw?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Approved 9 blog ideas; team needs 30-40 approved for efficient production](https://fathom.video/share/zB4xBTrdA2zw4bekAEbzrqFaLa1r1JAw?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [Shifting focus to engineering-related content to diversify audience](https://fathom.video/share/zB4xBTrdA2zw4bekAEbzrqFaLa1r1JAw?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
  - [Exploring LLM optimization strategies alongside traditional SEO practices](https://fathom.video/share/zB4xBTrdA2zw4bekAEbzrqFaLa1r1JAw?tab=summary&timestamp=1679.0)
  - [Team to provide engineering insights through internal and customer interviews](https://fathom.video/share/zB4xBTrdA2zw4bekAEbzrqFaLa1r1JAw?tab=summary&timestamp=2356.0)

## Topics

### Blog Approval Process

  - [Robert approved 9 out of 60 blog suggestions, focusing on high priority/yield](https://fathom.video/share/zB4xBTrdA2zw4bekAEbzrqFaLa1r1JAw?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
  - [Team needs 30-40 approved ideas for efficient content pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/zB4xBTrdA2zw4bekAEbzrqFaLa1r1JAw?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)
  - [Will add priority labels (high/low) to Airtable for clearer prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/zB4xBTrdA2zw4bekAEbzrqFaLa1r1JAw?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [Setting up email automation for article review notifications](https://fathom.video/share/zB4xBTrdA2zw4bekAEbzrqFaLa1r1JAw?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)

### Featured Image Design

  - [Current designs use too much purple; need more contrast and relevant imagery](https://fathom.video/share/zB4xBTrdA2zw4bekAEbzrqFaLa1r1JAw?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
  - [Considering text-based images for better context and SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/zB4xBTrdA2zw4bekAEbzrqFaLa1r1JAw?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
  - [Chris suggests leaning into text-based images for conveying meaning directly](https://fathom.video/share/zB4xBTrdA2zw4bekAEbzrqFaLa1r1JAw?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)

### Content Generation Workflow

  - [Detailed walkthrough of Atlas platform's article generation process](https://fathom.video/share/zB4xBTrdA2zw4bekAEbzrqFaLa1r1JAw?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
  - [Includes stages for topic selection, research, outlining, drafting, and SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/zB4xBTrdA2zw4bekAEbzrqFaLa1r1JAw?tab=summary&timestamp=1295.0)
  - [Heavy manual editing at outline and draft stages to ensure quality](https://fathom.video/share/zB4xBTrdA2zw4bekAEbzrqFaLa1r1JAw?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)

### SEO and LLM Optimization

  - [Implementing schema markup (FAQs, breadcrumbs) for better LLM performance](https://fathom.video/share/zB4xBTrdA2zw4bekAEbzrqFaLa1r1JAw?tab=summary&timestamp=1702.0)
  - [Exploring "zero volume" keywords for niche topics to capture LLM traffic](https://fathom.video/share/zB4xBTrdA2zw4bekAEbzrqFaLa1r1JAw?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
  - [Considering scraping forums (e.g., Archinect, Reddit) for common questions](https://fathom.video/share/zB4xBTrdA2zw4bekAEbzrqFaLa1r1JAw?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)
  - [Discussing multi-format content (blog, video, podcast) to dominate SERPs](https://fathom.video/share/zB4xBTrdA2zw4bekAEbzrqFaLa1r1JAw?tab=summary&timestamp=2281.0)

### Engineering Content Strategy

  - [Team to interview Ashish (CPO) for engineering insights](https://fathom.video/share/zB4xBTrdA2zw4bekAEbzrqFaLa1r1JAw?tab=summary&timestamp=2481.0)

  - [Seeking customer interview for direct engineering perspective](https://fathom.video/share/zB4xBTrdA2zw4bekAEbzrqFaLa1r1JAw?tab=summary&timestamp=2435.0)
